title: [ExportVerilog] Parametric Verilog Widths Printing `w-1` as `w+MaxValue`
body:
The following circuit:

```mlir
hw.module @Bar<w: i32 = 8>
  (%a: !hw.int<#hw.param.decl.ref<"w">>) -> (b: !hw.int<#hw.param.decl.ref<"w">>)  {
  hw.output %a : !hw.int<#hw.param.decl.ref<"w">>
}
```

Is printing out as `w + 0xFFFFFFFF`:

```verilog
module Bar
  #(parameter w = 8) (
  input  [w + 4294967295:0] a,
  output [w + 4294967295:0] b);

  assign b = a;	
endmodule
```

This likes like a simple problem of `-1` not showing up as intended.
